name: Turtles on the Run
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a double boiler, cook caramels and milk, stirring occasionally until smooth.
3. Pour chocolate chips into a plastic bag and set in a pan of hot water to melt.
4. For the crust, mix together butter, flour, brown sugar, and oats in a bowl. Stir and press into a buttered 8-inch square glass dish.
5. Bake the crust for about 5 minutes, then set aside.
6. When the caramel is smooth, pour it over the crust.
7. Pour the melting chocolate chips over the caramel.
8. Sprinkle pecans on top.
9. Refrigerate until ready to eat, and cut into bars when ready to serve, about 15 minutes.
